  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Chinese Translator / Personal Assistant",
  "description": "Luxeown Technology Limited is a fast-growing technology company based in Ikeja Lagos Nigeria.&nbsp;The company specializes in the sale of iPhones while also providing flexible loan services tailored specifically for iPhone users. With a strong commitment to accessibility and customer satisfaction, Luxeown Technology Ltd continues to expand its reach by making premium mobile devices more affordable and accessible to a wider audience.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Chinese Translator / Personal Assistant

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role


	Luxeown is seeking fluent, experienced, and highly professional Chinese Translators to join our team in Ikeja, Lagos. The ideal candidate will possess strong verbal and written communication skills in both Chinese and English, demonstrate high levels of discretion, and be capable of providing reliable administrative and linguistic support.
	This role requires someone organized, proactive, and capable of serving directly as a Personal Assistant to the Manager.


Key Responsibilities


	Provide accurate oral and written translation between Chinese and English.
	Serve as a Personal Assistant to the Manager, supporting daily operations and administrative tasks.
	Interpret during meetings, business discussions, and negotiations.
	Translate official documents, emails, reports, and other business materials.
	Coordinate schedules, appointments, and travel arrangements for the Manager.
	Draft correspondence and prepare reports as required.
	Maintain confidentiality of sensitive company information.
	Facilitate effective communication between management and internal/external stakeholders.
	Assist in organizing meetings and taking minutes when necessary.


Requirements


	Minimum of 1 year of experience as a professional Translator.
	Fluency in both spoken and written Chinese and English.
	Strong organizational and time management skills.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal abilities.
	Ability to multitask and work efficiently under pressure.
	High level of professionalism, discretion, and reliability.
	Must reside in or be willing to work in Ikeja, Lagos.


Salary
N400,000 - N800,000 / Month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV to:&nbsp;luxeowntechnology@gmail.com&nbsp;using &quot;Chinese Translator&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Chinese Translator / Personal Assistant Job at Luxeown Technology Limited




        
    

        
        Luxeown Technology Limited is a fast-growing technology company based in Ikeja Lagos Nigeria. The company specializes in the sale of iPhones while also providing flexible loan services tailored specifically for iPhone users. With a strong commitment to accessibility and customer satisfaction, Luxeown Technology Ltd continues to expand its reach by making premium mobile devices more affordable and accessible to a wider audience.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Chinese Translator / Personal Assistant

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Luxeown is seeking fluent, experienced, and highly professional Chinese Translators to join our team in Ikeja, Lagos. The ideal candidate will possess strong verbal and written communication skills in both Chinese and English, demonstrate high levels of discretion, and be capable of providing reliable administrative and linguistic support.
	This role requires someone organized, proactive, and capable of serving directly as a Personal Assistant to the Manager.


Key Responsibilities


	Provide accurate oral and written translation between Chinese and English.
	Serve as a Personal Assistant to the Manager, supporting daily operations and administrative tasks.
	Interpret during meetings, business discussions, and negotiations.
	Translate official documents, emails, reports, and other business materials.
	Coordinate schedules, appointments, and travel arrangements for the Manager.
	Draft correspondence and prepare reports as required.
	Maintain confidentiality of sensitive company information.
	Facilitate effective communication between management and internal/external stakeholders.
	Assist in organizing meetings and taking minutes when necessary.


Requirements


	Minimum of 1 year of experience as a professional Translator.
	Fluency in both spoken and written Chinese and English.
	Strong organizational and time management skills.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal abilities.
	Ability to multitask and work efficiently under pressure.
	High level of professionalism, discretion, and reliability.
	Must reside in or be willing to work in Ikeja, Lagos.


Salary
N400,000 - N800,000 / Month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV to: [email protected] using "Chinese Translator" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Job Vacancies at Luxeown Technology Limited
content:
Luxeown Technology Limited is a fast-growing technology company based in Ikeja Lagos Nigeria. The company specializes in the sale of iPhones while also providing flexible loan services tailored specifically for iPhone users. With a strong commitment to accessibility and customer satisfaction, Luxeown Technology Ltd continues to expand its reach by making premium mobile devices more affordable and accessible to a wider audience.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Chinese Translator / Personal Assistant

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Luxeown is seeking fluent, experienced, and highly professional Chinese Translators to join our team in Ikeja, Lagos. The ideal candidate will possess strong verbal and written communication skills in both Chinese and English, demonstrate high levels of discretion, and be capable of providing reliable administrative and linguistic support.
	This role requires someone organized, proactive, and capable of serving directly as a Personal Assistant to the Manager.


Key Responsibilities


	Provide accurate oral and written translation between Chinese and English.
	Serve as a Personal Assistant to the Manager, supporting daily operations and administrative tasks.
	Interpret during meetings, business discussions, and negotiations.
	Translate official documents, emails, reports, and other business materials.
	Coordinate schedules, appointments, and travel arrangements for the Manager.
	Draft correspondence and prepare reports as required.
	Maintain confidentiality of sensitive company information.
	Facilitate effective communication between management and internal/external stakeholders.
	Assist in organizing meetings and taking minutes when necessary.


Requirements


	Minimum of 1 year of experience as a professional Translator.
	Fluency in both spoken and written Chinese and English.
	Strong organizational and time management skills.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal abilities.
	Ability to multitask and work efficiently under pressure.
	High level of professionalism, discretion, and reliability.
	Must reside in or be willing to work in Ikeja, Lagos.


Salary
N400,000 - N800,000 / Month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV to: [email protected] using "Chinese Translator" as the subject of the email.

 

 

2.) Marketer

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (Onsite)

About the Role


	We are seeking dynamic, persuasive, and results-driven Marketers Executives to join our growing team. The ideal candidates will be responsible for actively engaging prospective customers, promoting the company’s products/services, and converting leads into paying clients.
	This role is best suited for individuals who are confident, target-oriented, and passionate about sales and customer engagement.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and approach prospective customers to promote company products/services.
	Actively engage with potential clients, both physically and through digital channels.
	Present and explain product offerings clearly to drive sales conversions.
	Meet and exceed assigned sales targets.
	Build and maintain strong customer relationships.
	Follow up on leads and ensure successful closure of sales.
	Provide feedback on customer needs, preferences, and market trends.
	Represent the company professionally at all times.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a B.Sc, HND, or OND in any relevant field with 1-2 years of experience.
	Proficiency in using an iPhone.
	Proven sales experience is an added advantage; however, fresh graduates with a strong, positive attitude are encouraged to apply.
	Self-motivated, confident, and results-driven.
	Strong communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to work independently and meet targets consistently.
	High level of energy, enthusiasm, and professionalism.


Remuneration


	Basic Salary: N100,000 - N150,000 / Month
	Commission: N20,000 per successful customer conversion.
	Transport allowance etc.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV to: [email protected] using "Marketer" as the subject of the email.

 

 

3.) Sale Representative

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (Onsite)
Start date: Immediately

About The Job


	We are seeking an experienced, highly organized, and results-driven Sales Representatives to join our growing team. The ideal candidate should be proactive, confident, and customer-focused, with a strong ability to drive revenue growth, maintain client relationships, meet set sales targets and knows how to operate iphone. If you are passionate about sales and enjoy working in a fast-paced environment, we encourage you to apply.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and develop new business opportunities to increase company revenue.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with existing and prospective clients.
	Represent, promote, and sell company products/services to customers.
	Meet and exceed monthly and quarterly sales targets.
	Prepare and deliver sales reports to management.
	Collaborate with internal teams to ensure customer satisfaction and timely service delivery.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor's Degree with 1–2 years of experience in sales management or a related sales role.
	Proven track record of meeting or exceeding sales targets.
	Strong communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
	Must know how to operate iphone
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.


Remuneration
N100,000 - N150,000 / Month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV to: [email protected] using "Sales Representative" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Procurement Officer",
  "description": "At Superfoods, we&#39;re all about serving great-tasting, fresh, and high-quality meals that bring people together. We blend local and international flavours to create great food that&#39;s not just convenient but also delicious and satisfying. Our goal is to make every visit Feel Welcoming, with Excellent Service and Affordable Options that fit your lifestyle. We aim to make Superfoods a way of life to all our guests, children and adults.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Abeokuta, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Develop and implement procurement strategies to optimize sourcing and supplier selection processes.
	Identify potential suppliers, conduct supplier evaluations, and negotiate contracts and pricing terms.
	Manage vendor relationships and monitor supplier performance to ensure compliance with contractual agreements and quality standards.
	Coordinate with internal stakeholders, such as production, finance, and operations, to align procurement activities with business needs.
	Maintain accurate records of procurement transactions, contracts, and vendor information.
	Monitor inventory levels and forecast demand to ensure adequate stock levels while minimizing carrying costs.
	Stay abreast of market trends, industry developments, and regulatory requirements to inform procurement decisions.
	Identify opportunities for cost savings and process improvements within the procurement function.


Qualifications and Requirements


	B.Sc/HND in Business Administration, Supply Chain Management, or related field with&nbsp;2-3 years of experience in procurement or supply chain roles.
	Strong negotiation and contract management skills.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal abilities.
	Proficiency in procurement software and Microsoft Office Suite.
	Analytical thinking and problem-solving skills.
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.


Required Skills:


	Negotiation skills
	Analytical skills
	Communication
	Organizational skills
	Problem-solving
	Attention to detail
	Knowledge of procurement processes


Salary
N100,000 - N150,000 / Month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV to:&nbsp;peopleoperations.superfoods@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Procurement Officer Job at Superfoods




        
    

        
        At Superfoods, we're all about serving great-tasting, fresh, and high-quality meals that bring people together. We blend local and international flavours to create great food that's not just convenient but also delicious and satisfying. Our goal is to make every visit Feel Welcoming, with Excellent Service and Affordable Options that fit your lifestyle. We aim to make Superfoods a way of life to all our guests, children and adults.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement Officer

Job Location: Abeokuta, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Develop and implement procurement strategies to optimize sourcing and supplier selection processes.
	Identify potential suppliers, conduct supplier evaluations, and negotiate contracts and pricing terms.
	Manage vendor relationships and monitor supplier performance to ensure compliance with contractual agreements and quality standards.
	Coordinate with internal stakeholders, such as production, finance, and operations, to align procurement activities with business needs.
	Maintain accurate records of procurement transactions, contracts, and vendor information.
	Monitor inventory levels and forecast demand to ensure adequate stock levels while minimizing carrying costs.
	Stay abreast of market trends, industry developments, and regulatory requirements to inform procurement decisions.
	Identify opportunities for cost savings and process improvements within the procurement function.


Qualifications and Requirements


	B.Sc/HND in Business Administration, Supply Chain Management, or related field with 2-3 years of experience in procurement or supply chain roles.
	Strong negotiation and contract management skills.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal abilities.
	Proficiency in procurement software and Microsoft Office Suite.
	Analytical thinking and problem-solving skills.
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.


Required Skills:


	Negotiation skills
	Analytical skills
	Communication
	Organizational skills
	Problem-solving
	Attention to detail
	Knowledge of procurement processes


Salary
N100,000 - N150,000 / Month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

  "title": "Account Assistant",
  "description": "At Superfoods, we&#39;re all about serving great-tasting, fresh, and high-quality meals that bring people together. We blend local and international flavours to create great food that&#39;s not just convenient but also delicious and satisfying. Our goal is to make every visit Feel Welcoming, with Excellent Service and Affordable Options that fit your lifestyle. We aim to make Superfoods a way of life to all our guests, children and adults.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Assistant

job Location:&nbsp;Abeokuta, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Assist with accounts payable and accounts receivable processes, including invoice processing, payment processing, and reconciliation.
	Maintain accurate records of financial transactions, including journal entries, ledgers, and bank statements.
	Prepare and verify financial documents, such as invoices, receipts, and expense reports.
	Assist with payroll processing, including data entry, calculations, and documentation.
	Monitor and reconcile bank accounts, credit card statements, and other financial accounts.
	Assist with financial reporting and analysis, including variance analysis and budget tracking.
	Respond to inquiries from vendors, customers, and internal stakeholders regarding financial matters.
	Assist with month-end and year-end closing processes, including preparing financial statements and reports.
	Collaborate with other departments to ensure accurate and timely financial information.
	Perform other accounting and administrative tasks as assigned.


Requirements and Qualifications


	B.Sc / HND in Accounting, Finance, or related field&nbsp;with 1-3 years of experience.
	Proven experience in accounting, finance, or a related field.
	Strong understanding of accounting principles and financial concepts.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office suite, particularly Excel and Word.
	Excellent organizational and time management skills.
	Attention to detail and accuracy in work.
	Strong communication and interpersonal abilities.
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
	Integrity and professionalism in handling sensitive financial information.
	Adaptability and willingness to learn and grow in the role.


Skills Required:


	Accounting principles
	Financial transactions
	Record-keeping
	Microsoft Office
	Organization
	Attention to detail
	Communication
	Teamwork
	Integrity
	Adaptability


Salary
N80,000 / Month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV to:&nbsp;peopleoperations.superfoods@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Posiiton as the subject of the email.",

Account Assistant Job at Superfoods




        
    

        
        At Superfoods, we're all about serving great-tasting, fresh, and high-quality meals that bring people together. We blend local and international flavours to create great food that's not just convenient but also delicious and satisfying. Our goal is to make every visit Feel Welcoming, with Excellent Service and Affordable Options that fit your lifestyle. We aim to make Superfoods a way of life to all our guests, children and adults.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Assistant

job Location: Abeokuta, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Assist with accounts payable and accounts receivable processes, including invoice processing, payment processing, and reconciliation.
	Maintain accurate records of financial transactions, including journal entries, ledgers, and bank statements.
	Prepare and verify financial documents, such as invoices, receipts, and expense reports.
	Assist with payroll processing, including data entry, calculations, and documentation.
	Monitor and reconcile bank accounts, credit card statements, and other financial accounts.
	Assist with financial reporting and analysis, including variance analysis and budget tracking.
	Respond to inquiries from vendors, customers, and internal stakeholders regarding financial matters.
	Assist with month-end and year-end closing processes, including preparing financial statements and reports.
	Collaborate with other departments to ensure accurate and timely financial information.
	Perform other accounting and administrative tasks as assigned.


Requirements and Qualifications


	B.Sc / HND in Accounting, Finance, or related field with 1-3 years of experience.
	Proven experience in accounting, finance, or a related field.
	Strong understanding of accounting principles and financial concepts.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office suite, particularly Excel and Word.
	Excellent organizational and time management skills.
	Attention to detail and accuracy in work.
	Strong communication and interpersonal abilities.
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
	Integrity and professionalism in handling sensitive financial information.
	Adaptability and willingness to learn and grow in the role.


Skills Required:


	Accounting principles
	Financial transactions
	Record-keeping
	Microsoft Office
	Organization
	Attention to detail
	Communication
	Teamwork
	Integrity
	Adaptability


Salary
N80,000 / Month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Posiiton as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Job Openings at MBIS International
content:
MBIS International is a growing nursery and primary school delivering the British Curriculum. The school is committed to maintaining high standards of teaching, learning and pupil achievement

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.)  Academic Standards Officer

Job Location: Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a detail-oriented Academic StandardsOfficer to support the Curriculum Director in maintaining consistent academic standards across the school.
	This role involves daily classroom monitoring, review of pupils’ work, evaluation of teaching and assessment practices and ensuring compliance with school policies.
	The officer will identify strengths, highlight areas for improvement and provide professional feedback, reporting directly to the Curriculum Director.


Key Responsibilities


	Conduct daily classroom observations to monitor teaching quality, pupil engagement and classroom management.
	Ensure lessons follow the approved curriculum and schemes of work.
	Review teachers’ marking, feedback and assessment practices for consistency and compliance with school policy.
	Carry out regular checks of pupils’ workbooks and presentation standards.
	Assess pupils’ understanding of concepts through lesson observations and review of classwork.
	Provide constructive professional feedback to teachers.
	Identify areas where teachers require support, mentoring, or development.
	Prepare academic monitoring reports highlighting strengths, concerns, and recommended actions for the Curriculum Director.


Accountability
The officer ensures high academic standards by:


	Maintaining consistent teaching and learning practices across the school.
	Identifying patterns in teaching quality and curriculum delivery.
	Escalating significant compliance concerns with recommended corrective actions to the Curriculum Director.
	Supporting inspection readiness and strong quality assurance processes.


Minimum Requirements


	Candidates should possess a Degree in Education with a minimum 5 years teaching experience, preferably in a British or international curriculum school.
	Current or recent Headteacher, Deputy Head, or senior leadership experience.
	Experience in lesson observation, academic monitoring and teacher supervision.
	IT skills: proficient in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint) and school management systems.
	Strong written and verbal communication skills.


Desirable Skills:


	Familiarity with British curriculum assessment frameworks (Key Stages, phonics, maths mastery).
	Experience with inspection readiness or school quality assurance processes.
	Ability to analyse patterns in teaching quality and pupil progress.
	Strong organisational skills and attention to detail.


Personal Qualities:


	Professional, ethical and integrity-driven.
	Observant, detail-oriented and confident in providing professional feedback.
	Passionate about improving teaching standards and pupil outcomes.


Salary
N200,000 / Month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their a detailed CV and a one-page handwritten statement outlining their professional experience and what they would bring to the role, to: [email protected] using "Application – Academic Standards Officer" as the subject of the email.

 

2.) Female School Administrative Assistant

Job Location: Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role


	We are a well-established Nursery and Primary School committed to maintaining high standards of professionalism, organisation and communication in all aspects of school life. Our administrative team plays a vital role in ensuring that the school runs efficiently while providing excellent service to pupils, parents, staff and visitors.
	We are seeking a Female School Administrative Assistant who is highly organised, proactive, detail-oriented and capable of working in a fast-paced school environment.
	The successful candidate will serve as the first point of contact for our school community and provide essential administrative support to ensure the smooth day-to-day running of the school.
	This role requires someone who can anticipate needs, manage responsibilities efficiently and support the school office effectively, helping to maintain a well-organised and professional office environment.


Key Responsibilities
Front Desk and Reception Duties:


	Warmly welcome pupils, parents, staff and visitors while maintaining a professional and friendly demeanour.
	Ensure all visitors sign in and out in line with safeguarding procedures.
	Direct enquiries appropriately and provide accurate information where required.


Attendance and Record Keeping:


	Accurately monitor and record pupil attendance daily.
	Follow up promptly on unexplained absences.
	Maintain accurate records of late arrivals and early departures.
	Ensure all school databases and records are consistently updated and accurate.


Administrative Support:


	Provide efficient administrative support including photocopying, printing and laminating
	Maintain clear, accurate and legible handwritten records where required.
	Take meeting notes and produce clear, well-structured minutes of meetings when required.


Office Management:


	Manage and update school office and reception notice boards, ensuring information displayed is accurate, relevant and well presented at all times.
	Ensure the reception and office areas remain organised, tidy and professional at all times.


Social Media and Communication:


	Create engaging weekly content for the school’s social media platforms, highlighting school activities, achievements and events, and submit content for posting in line with the school’s communication schedule.
	Maintain and monitor the school’s events and birthdays calendar, ensuring important dates, celebrations and activities are properly tracked and communicated in advance.


Parent and Pupil Support:


	Respond professionally to parent enquiries regarding school procedures, enrolment and schedules.
	Provide basic support to pupils with minor concerns such as lost items


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a Degree in Administration/Management.
	Minimum of 3 years of continuous post-graduation experience in an administrative role within a school environment.
	Applicants must reside in Ibadan and be able to commute easily to Jericho, Ibadan.


Key Skills and Qualities:


	Excellent Communication Skills - Outstanding written and verbal communication skills with the ability to interact professionally with pupils, parents and staff.
	Exceptional Organisation and Attention to Detail - Ability to manage multiple responsibilities efficiently while maintaining accurate records and paying close attention to detail.
	Clear and Legible Handwriting - A high standard of handwriting is essential for maintaining clear and professional school records.
	Strong Computer Skills - Proficient in Microsoft Office applications and confident with digital systems and data management.
	Proactive and Solution-Oriented - Able to take initiative, anticipate needs and resolve issues efficiently without constant supervision.
	Professionalism and Role Awareness - Maintains appropriate professional boundaries while consistently representing the school positively.


Salary
N150,000 / Month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Application Documents to: [email protected] using "Application – School Administrative Assistant" as the subject of the email.

Application Documents


	Your CV
	A one-page handwritten statement explaining why you believe you are suitable for the role. The handwritten statement should be clearly written, scanned and attached to your application email.
	A full-length photograph


 

 

3.)  Female Primary Teacher

Job Location: Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time 

Job Description


	We are seeking a dedicated and enthusiastic to join our vibrant school community. The successful candidate will teach pupils in our Primary – Years arm, following a well-structured British curriculum.
	This role is ideal for an experienced educator who is passionate about pupil progress and committed to excellence in teaching and learning. Our school provides comprehensive resources to help you deliver quality education.


Essential Requirements


	Minimum academic qualification: B.Ed in Primary Education Studies or a B.Sc./B.A./HND with a PGDE from a reputable institution
	Minimum of three (3) years of post-graduation experience teaching in a structured primary school environment
	Must be resident in Ibadan, and live within a reasonable commuting distance of Jericho, Ibadan
	TRCN certification is highly desirable and will be considered an added advantage
	Strong classroom management skills, with the ability to create a disciplined, respectful and focused learning environment
	Proven excellence in teaching core subjects—English, Mathematics, and Science—alongside the ability to effectively deliver a broad range of primary-level subjects, tailored to meet diverse learner needs
	Proficient in Microsoft Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and email, with confident application in day-to-day teaching and administration
	Ability to adopt and model the school’s handwriting scheme, demonstrating clear, legible, and consistent writing
	Excellent command of spoken and written English, with the ability to communicate effectively and professionally
	Highly organised, with the ability to plan, deliver, and maintain well-structured lessons and create high-quality classroom displays
	Maintains consistently high expectations for pupil behaviour, academic progress, and overall achievement
	Demonstrates a solid understanding of assessment methods, learner tracking systems, and providing effective feedback
	Clear knowledge of safeguarding procedures, with a commitment to upholding best practices in pupil welfare and protection
	Well-versed in effective teaching methodologies, and committed to continuous professional development and improvement
	A genuine passion for teaching and pupil development


Key Responsibilities


	Deliver high-quality, engaging teaching aligned with the school’s curriculum and standards.
	Assess and mark pupils’ work promptly and effectively, in line with school policy.
	Administer assessments accurately and fairly, following established procedures.
	Create and maintain a well-organised, stimulating classroom environment that supports learning and wellbeing.
	Provide clear, constructive feedback to pupils and communicate progress effectively with parents and carers.
	Promote positive behaviour and consistently uphold the school’s values and expectations.


Salary and Benefits
N110,000 - N120,000 / Month (depending on experience).

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a one-page handwritten statement explaining how you meet our requirements to: [email protected] using "Application for Primary Teaching Position"as the subject of the email.

Note: This position is ideal for a teacher who enjoys working in a close-knit school community, where every pupil receives individual attention and support to thrive academically and personally.    

    

        Click here to Apply
